metadata.title: AURA - A Space to Remember
metadata.description: A space for yoga, sauna rituals, meditation, clarity sessions, and community in Cologne.

about.heading: What is AURA?
about.intro: AURA is a space for stillness, movement, and connection in Cologne. You don't need to become anything here. You get to remember.
about.description: Yoga, sauna rituals, meditation, and honest conversation in a warm room. For people who are ready to remember who they already are.
about.loft: The Loft is an open space to arrive, linger, and connect. Between sessions, simply be. A space that breathes.
about.pillar_body_description: Yoga, movement, sauna rituals, nervous system regulation. Feeling the body, not optimizing it.
about.pillar_clarity_description: 1:1 Clarity Sessions, meditation, inner perception. Seeing what is - without judgment.
about.pillar_community_description: The Loft, community experiences, shared meals. Connection that sustains.

yoga.title: Yoga
yoga.description: Small groups, max 12 people. Classes morning, noon, and evening. Practice that builds stability in the body, not performance on the mat.

sauna.title: Sauna & Rituals
sauna.description: Guided rituals combining breathwork, meditation, heat, and cold. A ritual space for nervous system regulation and self-experience.

clarity.title: Clarity Sessions
clarity.description: 1:1 guidance for transitions, decisions, and inner shifts.

meditation.title: Meditation
meditation.description: Silent meditation, guided inner journeys, strengthening intuition. A path back to your own compass.

community.title: Community Experiences
community.description: Yoga, breathwork, sauna, and shared meals in one experience. Deeper connection beyond single sessions.

location.heading: Where to find us
location.description: In the Uni-Center, a residential complex with over 2,000 residents. Concrete, city rhythm, the pulse of life. Right in the middle: a space of stillness.

forYou.heading: Who is AURA for?
forYou.description: For anyone who senses there's more. Who isn't looking for the next trend, but for a place to arrive. I have enough. I am enough.

waitlist.heading: Be part of it from the start
waitlist.description: AURA is opening soon. As a Founding Member, you'll get early access - at a special rate, to a space that's also yours.

studio.heading: AURA Studio
studio.intro: Yoga, sauna rituals, and nervous system regulation - in a space that holds.
studio.description: Small groups. This is about you, not the perfect pose. The practice is honest and accessible.
studio.loft_description: Across three levels: lounge areas, a quiet gallery for journaling and conversation, a small kitchen for tea and water. Between sessions, simply be. The rhythm here happens on its own, not by schedule.
studio.yogaraum_description: The intimate space for movement and practice. Max 10-12 participants per class. Classes spread through the day: morning, noon, evening.
studio.sauna_description: Guided rituals combining breathwork, meditation, heat phases, and cold impulses. Followed by integration time in the yoga room and Loft. 8-12 participants.
studio.sauna_dropin_description: Open sauna access on selected evenings. A low-barrier community format for people from the building and neighborhood. Drop by, arrive, be.
studio.kursplanDescription: We're currently building the timetable. Join the waitlist to be the first to know.

clarity.heading: Clarity Sessions
clarity.intro: 1:1 guidance for moments when you need clarity.
clarity.description: A space where you can see what is. For transitions, decisions, inner shifts. For everything that wants to be heard.

philosophy.heading: Philosophy
philosophy.description: We believe most people simply need to remember - what they already know, already feel, already are.
philosophy.remember_text: To remember what was always there. Your own clarity, your own stillness, your own rhythm. AURA creates the space for that. Through presence.
philosophy.pillar_body_text: Yoga, movement, sauna rituals, nervous system regulation. The body as access to what we know before we think.
philosophy.pillar_clarity_text: 1:1 Clarity Sessions, meditation, inner perception. Seeing what is - without judgment, without guidance. Just clarity.
philosophy.pillar_community_text: The Loft, community experiences, shared meals, real encounters. Connection that isn't staged, but emerges.
philosophy.anticonsumption_text: Many places in our city are tied to consumption. Cafés, bars, restaurants - always with the expectation to buy something. AURA is a space where you can simply be. No obligation to consume, no expectation.
philosophy.enough_heading: I have enough. I am enough.
philosophy.enough_text: Not an affirmation, but an invitation. To stop optimizing yourself. To arrive at what is already here.
philosophy.ritualraum_text: AURA is an urban ritual space. A place designed for nervous system regulation, self-experience, and a more awake life. In Uni-Center Cologne, in the middle of everyday life.

monika.name: Monika
monika.description: Monika holds space, physically and energetically. With a background in yoga, meditation, and systemic guidance, she creates places where people are free to remember.
